hooks.command: { read -r json; f=$(echo "$json" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath'); [[ "$f" == *.py ]] && uv run --directory /Users/jeancsil/code/agents ruff format --silent "$f" 2>/dev/null && uv run --directory /Users/jeancsil/code/agents ruff check --fix --silent "$f" 2>/dev/null; } || true
